    <div>
    <img src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5fe64f42-504a-48cd-ba3c-d9e615dbf8aa" alt="Umeed AI Banner" />

<h3><i>AI-Powered Loan Assistance for Everyone</i></h3>
     
</div>

Umeed AI is a smart web platform that provides instant *loan risk scoring* and *personalized installment plans*, making borrowing and lending safer, faster, and more transparent. The platform empowers both loan seekers and officers with AI-driven insights to reduce defaults and streamline approvals.

## ⚠ &nbsp;Problem Statement

<blockquote>
Many people struggle to get loans due to complex risk evaluation and lack of guidance. Loan officers also face challenges predicting defaults and suggesting optimal repayment plans.
</blockquote>

## 🎯 &nbsp;Solution

Umeed AI provides instant *risk scores* and *recommended installment plans* using AI models, giving both borrowers and lenders actionable insights. The web app simplifies decision-making and improves financial inclusion.

## ⚙ &nbsp;Features

### ✨ &nbsp;Key Features (v1.0.0)

- *Instant Risk Score*: AI calculates creditworthiness instantly.
- *Recommended Installment Plans*: Suggests optimal repayment options based on risk score.
- *Borrower & Officer Dashboard*: Clear visualization of loans, risk, and repayment status.


### 🚀 &nbsp;Upcoming Features

- Multi-language support for broader accessibility
- Integration with payment gateways for direct EMI collection
- Enhanced AI analytics for predicting default trends
- Mobile app version for on-the-go access

## 🚧 &nbsp;Getting Started

### 📝 &nbsp;Prerequisites

Before running locally, ensure you have:

- Node.js and npm
- Python 3.10+
- Virtual environment (venv) for Python
- Git

### 🛠 &nbsp;Installation

1. *Clone the repository*

```bash
git clone https://github.com/<your-username>/Umeed-AI.git
